title: SecuritiesCTSTimeEnum
description: Details the day on which securities collateral is required to be transferred relative to the Notification Time.

oneOf.title: FirstDay
oneOf.description: The securities collateral should be transferred on the first local business day.

oneOf.title: Next
oneOf.description: The securities collateral should be transferred on the next day.

oneOf.title: Same
oneOf.description: The securities collateral should be transferred on the same day.

oneOf.title: SecondDay
oneOf.description: The securities collateral should be transferred on the second local business day.

oneOf.title: ThirdDay
oneOf.description: The securities collateral should be transferred on the third local business day.
